title: Monodex Context
description: Context file storing the default catalog and label for commands

catalog.description: Default catalog name for commands. Must match the regex: ^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$ (kebab-case, 1-64 chars). Authoritative validation is in src/engine/identifier.rs.

label.description: Default label name for indexing/searching. Must match the regex: ^[a-z0-9]+(?:[./=-][a-z0-9]+)*$ (Git-like, 1-128 chars). The '=' character is permitted but not interpreted. Authoritative validation is in src/engine/identifier.rs.

set_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the context was set
